## LibraryData.IMergeLibrarySource.filter property

Controls which collections to merge from this library.

- `true` (default): Merge all collections. - `false`<!-- -->: Merge no collections (skip this library). - `TCollectionId[]`<!-- -->: Merge only the specified collections by name. - `ILibraryLoadParams`<!-- -->: Fine-grained control using include/exclude patterns.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly filter?: LibraryLoadSpec<TCollectionId>;
```
